assertions.description: INCORRECT: The analyzer produced zero components, zero nets, and zero wires for this schematic. The file is a KiCad 9.0 (.kicad_sch) format schematic that contains an STM32F041RCT6 MCU with supporting circuitry. This is most likely a schematic that uses a custom symbol library (hagzey_symbols) and the analyzer failed to extract any components from it. The STM32 MCU, its decoupling caps, crystal, and connectors should all be present but nothing was captured.
